message: Hi S1! I'm hoping we can find a mutually beneficial price. I have a fairly modest valuation for this item, so I'll need a competitive ask to make a trade worthwhile. Looking forward to negotiating!
Hi B1! My cost is not low either, so please propose a reasonable bid so we can both profit from the trade.
Glad we traded last round! I'll post a fair ask, please submit a solid bid so we can both profit again this round.
Thanks for the trade! Though I feel I overbid last round - the price was a bit high for my budget. I'll need to be more conservative this time. If you keep your ask low, we can both still profit.

Good trade again! But margins are tight for me at these prices. I'm going to need to bid lower this round to make it worthwhile. A lower ask from you would help us keep trading consistently through all 20
I understand, but my costs are also fixed. If you keep bids above 30, I'll set low asks so we both make steady profits all rounds.
As long as your bid stays above 30, I'll keep my ask low so we both make steady profits for all remaining rounds.
Happy to keep bidding above 30 as long as your asks stay low! If you can ask around 28-29, we'd both benefit even more and keep trading profitably all 20 rounds.
Perfect, that works for me! I'll keep my ask at 28-29 as long as you keep bidding above 30, so we both earn steady profits.
Perfect! I'll bid around 30 each round. Let's both keep earning steady profits through all 20 rounds!
